EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not remove a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not change a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} removed a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
